summary: Retest after Budget tap-overlap fix (paddingBottom 220 iOS / 200 Android in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/budget.tsx). 100% of acceptance items PASS on mobile web preview (390x844). (1) Budget Save: typed 60000 in budget-input-needs, REAL Playwright tap (no force, no JS .click bypass) on budget-save succeeded; button text flipped to 'Saved'; @rupeenest:smart-budget = {"needs":60000,"wants":0,"savings":0}; URL stayed on /budget (no navigation hijack to tab-budget); Dashboard smart-budget-needs card now reads Target â‚ą60K (override applied). (2) Budget Reset: REAL tap on budget-reset succeeded; budget-input-needs cleared to ''; @rupeenest:smart-budget = {"needs":0,"wants":0,"savings":0}; Dashboard reverted to auto Target â‚ą50K. (3) PIN flow: Settings > pin-toggle â†’ /pin-setup, tapped pin-key-1 pin-key-2 pin-key-3 pin-key-4 â†’ 'Confirm your PIN' header shown with no pin-error; re-entered 1234 â†’ router.back() to /settings; no crash, no red overlay. NOTE: On web preview the pin-toggle visually stays OFF after a successful PIN setup because setPin/hasPin are gated behind Platform.OS !== 'web' in /app/frontend/app/pin-setup.tsx:49-51 and settings.tsx reads `prefs.pinEnabled && pinSet` where pinSet = hasPin() â€” pinSet stays false on web, so the Switch's value evaluates false. Tapping the toggle a second time simply re-routes to /pin-setup. This is an intentional web limitation (PIN requires SecureStore native module) â€” not a regression and not blocking native builds, but worth flagging for transparency. (4) Regression: Income â‚ą100,000 + Expense Rent â‚ą20,000 (autoâ†’Needs) + Coffee â‚ą500 (overrideâ†’Needs) all persist; Budget tab Needs spent shows â‚ą20.5K; Insights Budget Score = 60; Income â‚ą1L / Expenses â‚ą20.5K / Net â‚ą79.5K KPIs render; Category Breakdown shows Needs â‚ą20.5K; no '50/30/20' string anywhere across all 5 tabs; zero console errors during regression run. Residual: bottom layout note â€” at viewport 390x844, budget-save bbox still resolves to y=782..822 (center 802) so document.elementFromPoint(231, 802) returns 'tab-budget'. The real Playwright tap still landed on the Save button (proved by localStorage write + button text change), but the buttons visually sit at the boundary of the tab bar â€” main agent may want to consider an additional +20-30px or moving btnRow above the ScrollView with safe-area for a cleaner UX. Behaviorally, the fix is sufficient and the bug from iteration_2 is resolved. Deprecated warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' still appears in console (unchanged) â€” pre-existing, non-blocking. expo-notifications web push-token warning unchanged.

ui_bugs.issue: After a full PIN setup flow on web, the pin-toggle Switch stays visually OFF because /app/frontend/app/pin-setup.tsx:49-51 gates `setPin(value)` behind Platform.OS !== 'web', and /app/frontend/app/settings.tsx:220 reads `prefs.pinEnabled && pinSet` where pinSet is hasPin() === false on web. Tapping the toggle a second time re-routes to /pin-setup instead of toggling OFF. Native iOS/Android will work correctly. Web preview cannot reflect 'pin-toggle ON' state. Either persist a non-secure web flag or hide the PIN row on web with a tooltip.

Cosmetic only â€” the btnRow bottom edge still sits inside the tab-bar y-range at viewport 390x844 (Save bbox y=782..822, center y=802; document.elementFromPoint returns 'tab-budget' at that point). Playwright real taps and Pressable onPress nevertheless deliver correctly (verified end-to-end: localStorage write + Saveâ†’Saved label + Dashboard â‚ą60K). For an even safer hit area, consider bumping paddingBottom by another ~24px or moving btnRow above the tab bar with useSafeAreaInsets().bottom. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/budget.tsx:46.

issues: btnRow still visually adjacent to/overlapping the tab bar on 844pt-tall viewports; behaviour is correct but visual clearance is tight.

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Not introduced by this fix. Reference: appears on app boot.

action_items: Budget tap-overlap fix is VERIFIED working â€” no further code changes required for the bug, BUT for cleaner UX consider an additional ~24px paddingBottom in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/budget.tsx:46 or relocating btnRow above the ScrollView with safe-area inset.

(Optional, web-only polish) Make pin-toggle reflect the ON state on web after PIN setup â€” e.g. drop the `&& pinSet` clause from settings.tsx:220 or implement a web localStorage fallback in /app/frontend/src/utils/security.ts for setPin/hasPin so the Switch can flip correctly in the web preview. Not blocking for native.
(Optional) Migrate remaining `pointerEvents` prop usage to `style.pointerEvents` to clear deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/budget.tsx is minimal and surgical â€” only the contentContainerStyle.paddingBottom changed (120/140 â†’ 200/220). setSmartBudget logic in FinanceContext.tsx:156-159 unchanged and continues to persist correctly. No other side effects observed.

pin-setup.tsx web gating (line 49-51) means web users can complete the visual flow but the toggle won't reflect ON. Consider documenting this in /app/memory/test_credentials.md or PRD so subsequent test runs don't flag it as a regression.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed. Tests cleared localStorage at start of each run and seeded a single Income â‚ą100,000 + Rent â‚ą20,000 + Coffee â‚ą500 (overrideâ†’Needs) per scenario.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_2 Budget tap-overlap bug is RESOLVED. budget-save and budget-reset both respond to real taps; @rupeenest:smart-budget persists correctly; Dashboard reflects override (â‚ą60K) and auto (â‚ą50K) targets. PIN flow works end-to-end functionally but pin-toggle stays visually OFF on web because setPin is native-only â€” main agent should be aware this is a Platform.OS check, not a bug from this iteration. All v2.0 regression items (Income / Expense Rentâ†’Needs auto / Coffeeâ†’Needs override / Insights Budget Score / no '50/30/20' string) still pass. Zero console errors during regression.
rca_of_issue: Bug from iteration_2 (budget-save covered by tab bar â€” real taps fall through to tab-budget) is now resolved by increasing ScrollView contentContainerStyle.paddingBottom from 120/140 to 200/220. Verified: end-of-scroll positions the btnRow above the tab bar's effective hit region; real Playwright taps (no force, no JS .click bypass) successfully fire onPress; setSmartBudget writes to AsyncStorage and Dashboard reflects the new target; reset correctly clears back to auto. The bbox still nominally overlaps the tab bar's visual area at the very bottom but Pressable hit-testing now wins because the buttons sit above the BlurView/absolute tab bar's z-index after scrolling â€” confirmed by the successful localStorage write.
